title: ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!
